scripts.desktop:build: npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:start
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:prepare:python && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:prepare:python && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:prepare:python && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.desktop:dist:mac:x64: npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:prepare:python && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --x64 --publish never
scripts.desktop:dist:mac:arm64: npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:prepare:python && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: npm run desktop:build:frontend && npm run desktop:prepare:python && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage --x64 --publish never
